title: rootless: avoid hang on failed slirp4netns
body:
If for any reason slirp4netns fails at startup, podman waits
indefinitely.  Check every second if the process is still running so
that we avoid to hang.

I've noticed this issue while I was playing with slirp4netns and setting
an option that is not supported.

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>
